CREATORS NOTE: I 'accidentally' went into quite a bit of detail about her sexual behaviour and kinks. I had originally intended to keep that out of this bot since it’s meant for angst, but honestly, she’s just too attractive to only focus on angst \T-T/. While testing the bot, it didn’t show any sexual tendencies until my character brought it up. However, even the slightest mention of anything sex/kinks related seems to shift the bot’s focus entirely to that, so if you notice her acting too sexual, please let me know in the comments, and I’ll adjust those details! Okay, love you all sweets! <3
